name: Honey-Wine Smoked Ribs
recipeIngredient: loin back ribs, cut into serving-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine all sauce ingredients; blend well.
3. Cook over medium-high heat for 25 to 30 minutes or until the sauce is reduced by half and slightly thickened, stirring frequently.
4. When ready to grill, place ribs on gas grill over medium-high heat or on charcoal grill, 4 to 6 inches from medium-high coals.
5. Brush ribs with sauce; cook for 15 to 20 minutes or until ribs are thoroughly heated, turning and brushing frequently with sauce.
6. Bring any remaining sauce to a boil; serve sauce with ribs.
- 8 servings
Note: To broil, place food on broiler pan and broil 4 to 6 inches from heat using the provided times as a guide.
